revision.comment: Bot: Creating normal ill redirect for [[Category:Lua-based templates]].
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:MediaWiki:Titleprotected]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:qq]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Pages created from Interlanguage links
Bot: remove obsolete category Automatic wikipedia redirects
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
/* top */add mw-parser-output wrapper in preparation for TemplateStyles in [[Module:Message box]]
revision.text:
{{fmbox |type = editnotice |id = mw-titleprotected |image = [[File:Create-protection-shackle.svg|128px|link=|alt=]] |text = '''The page title you have tried to create has been protected from creation.''' {{#switch:$2 | deprecating [[WP:SALT|protected pages]] | deprecating [[WP:PT|protected titles]] = | #default = The reason given is: $2. }} You may also wish to check the [{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=delete&page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}} deletion log].
If you feel this page should be created, please... * ...''first'' ask the [[User:$1|protecting administrator]] to review proposed new content for the page, being sure to have adequate independent, [[Wikipedia:Identifying reliable sources|reliable sources]] to meet any '''notability''' requirements as set forth in the [[Wikipedia:Notability#General_notability_guideline|general notability guideline]] or [[:Category:Wikipedia notability guidelines|other appropriate specific guideline]]. * ...''then'' raise the matter at [[Wikipedia:Deletion review|deletion review]], being careful to quote the exact page name or address and the reasons you feel the page should now be created. Pages are usually only blocked from creation after significant discussion or disruption, so good reasons for seeking review are usually required. You will also need to show that the previous concerns are no longer a problem. }}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: overwriting with templates included
revision.text:
{{fmbox |type = editnotice |id = mw-titleprotected |image = [[File:Create-protection-shackle.svg|128px|link=|alt=]] |text = '''The page title you have tried to create has been protected from creation.''' {{#switch:$2 | deprecating [[WP:SALT|protected pages]] | deprecating [[WP:PT|protected titles]] = | #default = The reason given is: $2. }} You may also wish to check the [{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=delete&page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}} deletion log].
If you feel this page should be created, please... * ...''first'' ask the [[User:$1|protecting administrator]] to review proposed new content for the page, being sure to have adequate independent, [[Wikipedia:Identifying reliable sources|reliable sources]] to meet any '''notability''' requirements as set forth in the [[Wikipedia:Notability#General_notability_guideline|general notability guideline]] or [[:Category:Wikipedia notability guidelines|other appropriate specific guideline]]. * ...''then'' raise the matter at [[Wikipedia:Deletion review|deletion review]], being careful to quote the exact page name or address and the reasons you feel the page should now be created. Pages are usually only blocked from creation after significant discussion or disruption, so good reasons for seeking review are usually required. You will also need to show that the previous concerns are no longer a problem. }}

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25397554627|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{fmbox |type = editnotice |id = mw-titleprotected |image = [[File:Create-protection-shackle.svg|128px|link=|alt=]] |text = '''The page title you have tried to create has been protected from creation.''' {{#switch:$2 | deprecating [[WP:SALT|protected pages]] | deprecating [[WP:PT|protected titles]] = | #default = The reason given is: $2. }} You may also wish to check the [{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=delete&page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}} deletion log].
If you feel this page should be created, please... * ...''first'' ask the [[User:$1|protecting administrator]] to review proposed new content for the page, being sure to have adequate independent, [[Wikipedia:Identifying reliable sources|reliable sources]] to meet any '''notability''' requirements as set forth in the [[Wikipedia:Notability#General_notability_guideline|general notability guideline]] or [[:Category:Wikipedia notability guidelines|other appropriate specific guideline]]. * ...''then'' raise the matter at [[Wikipedia:Deletion review|deletion review]], being careful to quote the exact page name or address and the reasons you feel the page should now be created. Pages are usually only blocked from creation after significant discussion or disruption, so good reasons for seeking review are usually required. You will also need to show that the previous concerns are no longer a problem. }}
